---
title: "Map of Ukraine"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(maps)

ukraine <- map_data("world", region = "Ukraine")
uzhhorod <- data.frame(city = "Uzhhorod", lon = 22.2879, lat = 48.6208)

ggplot(ukraine, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group)) +
  geom_polygon(fill = "white", color = "#0057B7", linewidth = 1) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  geom_point(data = uzhhorod, aes(x = lon, y = lat),
             color = "red", size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = uzhhorod, aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = city),
            vjust = 0.3, hjust = -0.05, nudge_x = 0.3, fontface = "bold",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  ggtitle("Ukrainian Biological Data Science Summer School",
          subtitle = "July 11 – 25, 2026") +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(color = "#0057B7", face = "bold", size = 13),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "black",   face = "bold", size = 11))
```
